rows.notification_text::eng: Let’s check in on your home activity!
rows.activity_title::eng: Let’s check in on your home activity!
rows.question_done::eng: Did you have a chance to try this?
rows.reply_no::eng: That is okay, do not be too hard on yourself. We encourage you to try and do it when you can.
rows.reply_happy::eng: Great to hear it went well. You are a star!
rows.reply_ok::eng: Sorry to hear it was difficult for you. Well done for trying.
rows.reply_sad::eng: Sorry to hear it was difficult for you. Well done for trying.
rows.outro_text::eng: Well done for exploring solutions to your challenges. Go try these solutions out. Your relationship with your child will get stronger and stronger!

rows.text_goal::eng: Your goal was to spend 5 minutes of one-on-one time with your child.
rows.reply_no::eng: That is okay. Try to find time with them this week!
rows.reply_happy::eng: That is great to hear! 🎉 Spending time with your child is a great way to build a good relationship with them!

rows.notification_text::eng: When you involve your child, how does it go?
rows.text_goal::eng: Your goal was to involve your child in an activity to help them learn.
rows.reply_no::eng: That is okay. Try to find time to do it more with them this week!
rows.reply_happy::eng: That’s great to hear! 🎉 Preparing your child for success in school will help them do well!

rows.notification_text::eng: Are you finding it easy to support your child's development every day?
rows.text_goal::eng: Your goal was to support your child's development.
rows.reply_happy::eng: That is great to hear! 😃 Supporting your child’s development will help them live a safe and healthy life.

rows.notification_text::eng: How did the conversation about household rules go with your child?
rows.text_goal::eng: Your goal was to set some structure at home.
rows.reply_happy::eng: That is great to hear! 💙 Helping your child follow household rules gives them a sense of safety and security needed to thrive.

rows.notification_text::eng: How did managing the challenging behaviour go?
rows.text_goal::eng: Your goal was to learn to manage your child's behaviour.
rows.reply_happy::eng: It sounds like your child tends to behave well, which is great to hear! 💙

rows.notification_text::eng: How has talking about safety been with your child?
rows.text_goal::eng: Your goal was to talk to your child about safety.
rows.reply_no::eng: That is okay. It is not easy to know how to keep your child safe and healthy, especially in this changing world.
rows.reply_happy::eng: Great job! Knowing how to keep your child safe and healthy is an important responsibility as a parent. In this changing world, it is not easy to do! 🌱

rows.notification_text::eng: How did sharing household tasks with your spouse go?
rows.text_goal::eng: Your goal was to share household tasks with your spouse.
rows.reply_happy::eng: That’s great to hear! Sharing tasks equally helps everyone feel valued.

rows.notification_text::eng: How did the budget planning go?
rows.text_goal::eng: Your goal was to plan a budget.
rows.reply_happy::eng: That’s amazing! 🎉 Keep doing this - your family will be better for it.
